executable_code.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')

# Preprocess columns
df['Điểm'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Điểm'], errors='coerce')
df = df[df['Trường'].notna() & (df['Trường'].str.strip() != "")]
df = df.dropna(subset=['Điểm'])

# Group by Trường and calculate mean score
school_avg = df.groupby('Trường')['Điểm'].mean().reset_index()

# Filter for average score > 6.0
school_avg = school_avg[school_avg['Điểm'] > 6.0]

# Round to 2 decimal places
school_avg['Điểm'] = school_avg['Điểm'].round(2)

# Convert to list and print as JSON
result = school_avg.values.tolist()
print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False))
